# Fix PR Template

<!-- What was broken and how is it fixed? -->

## Related Issues/Milestones

- Fixes #<issue_number>
- Milestone: <milestone_name_or_link>

## Root Cause

<!-- Short root-cause summary. -->

## Changes

<!-- Minimal, targeted changes preferred. -->

## Testing

- [ ] Reproduction steps confirmed on main
- [ ] Added regression test(s)
- [ ] Verified fix via:
  - [ ] Unit tests
  - [ ] Integration tests
  - [ ] Manual steps:
    1. ...
    2. ...

## Risk & Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan: <how to revert safely>

## Checklist

- [ ] Lint/format pass
- [ ] CI green
- [ ] Affects docs? If yes, updated
